title: IWFC's Wither Storm Modpack
description:
A simple Wither Storm Modpack that I use to play with my friends!

This modpack is my first modpack! So don't expect the best... It's just a few mods that I could find into one.

Thats kind of it!!

Have fun playing this Modpack, i guess..!
body:
![INFO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfe597a5bd570218764e5b2eb0166c80d0d3addc.png)
# A simple Wither Storm Modpack that I use to play with my friends!
 
This modpack adds the **Wither Storm!** Destroyer of worlds! _(well only one world)_

You should download this modpack if you want to have a _ok_ wither storm experience.

This modpack is my first modpack! So don't expect the best... It's just a few mods that I could find into one _low tier_ modpack.

### Thats kind of it!!
### 
Have fun playing this Modpack, I think...!


![TRAILER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6931ab0bf57dd05d6f427416e9c1efc2853e73d1.png)

## Some cinematic video showcasing most of the mechanics.
